title: eulophia dactylifera
intro: Eulophia dactylifera, also known as the fingered orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Eulophia genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia dactylifera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Eulophia dactylifera is often made into a paste or a decoction, which can be applied topically to the affected area or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
